name: android-libziparchive
title: android-libziparchive
description:
Library for ZIP archives
This library provides APIs for creating and manipulating ZIP archives.
.
This library is only used by Android SDK currently.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-libziparchive because Library for ZIP archives.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-libziparchive as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-libziparchive with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-libziparchive --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
